text_block_list.name: Sky & Fuji
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Attendees
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! You two are the coolest!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Wow, that was so different from what<n>I imagined! Different but... great!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Hey, I'd love to try something just<n>like that... May I have this dance? I<n>bet you'll be really good at taking the<n>lead!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Oh! I... I'll try!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it seems our dance ignited<n>something in everyone! The surprise<n>went perfectly! Now for one more<n>thing...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You're all the stars of the show now!<n>It's party time!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hey, was that dance part of Rudolf's<n>plan?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh? Don't ask me. It looks like they<n>made it up on their own.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: They made everyone want to dance<n>just by doing their thing... I've got to<n>admit, it wasn't half bad.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: What I'm saying is, the one who<n>requested the DJ time was me! I'm<n>sorry!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Why are you apologizing? My history<n>with her shouldn't stop you from<n>doing what you want.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: It's not that... I'm sorry for being<n>weak. I was always running in circles<n>because I couldn't figure out where I<n>was going.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: I may have fallen behind, but... I really<n>did try hard on this. I want to make an<n>amazing memory here, so I can have<n>a clean break... and move forward.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: (Maybe I've been narrow-minded<n>too. This isn't just her event. It's<n>something more.)

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hey, you're "!monad," aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Wha?! How the hell'd you know?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Heh, you're more honest than I<n>thought. Your profile icon is a math<n>formula. Looking at your laptop... I<n>guess I just got the same kind of<n>feeling.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: You're always wandering around the<n>track with it. An eyesore like that's<n>hard to forget. I take it you're DJing.<n>Better get ready—or maybe you<n>turned down the gig?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What's it matter to you?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I bet you didn't even reply to<n>the offer. Meaning you didn't<n>immediately turn it down... Wow,<n>you're still undecided?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Quit prodding me to do it. It's damn<n>pushy... Ohh, I get it now. You were a<n>fan of mine, huh?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Doesn't matter. What's definite is<n>someone chose you, but you didn't<n>choose anything in the end. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: It's a little pathetic. Don't you get it?<n>Your silence isn't an answer—it's<n>cowardice. Unless you want your<n>identity revealed, make your<n>decision... right now.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Why is it you're trying so hard to<n>drag me out like this?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Having your own flock is a precious<n>thing. You should take responsibility<n>for making your fans love you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...I don't have an outfit. If I go out like<n>this, I'll look like an idiot.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: I'll get you everything you need.<n>You're going on that stage. Just<n>focus on getting ready.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I hope your fashion sense isn't as<n>bad as it looks.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: ...Now, be a good girl and go make<n>those memories you're looking for.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: Hm? A LANE message from Sirius?<n>What?! N-no way!

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text: What is it? She okay?

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: We're going to Sirius's room! We<n>gotta get the stuff she asked for and<n>hightail it to the Droit!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: That was DJ Helios, everyone! Give<n>her a round of applause for those<n>popping beats!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: It's finally time for the DJ time<n>climax! Are you having fuuun?! Get<n>ready for the mysterious masked DJ<n>to make their entrance!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: Next up is... er, um, I'm not supposed<n>to read the exclamation point, right?<n>It's !monad, everyone! Pump it UUUP!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (Ugh... Why am I here? She wasn't<n>serious about outing me... I'm the one<n>who accepted the excuse to do it. But<n>why?)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (I'm normally more logical. Did Sky<n>and Fuji do this to me? Do I want to<n>make people happy all of a sudden?<n>Tch... No friggin' way.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (I've always liked music. Making my<n>own stuff was just... to have fun. It<n>was a good way to shut out all the<n>crap in the real world.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (Sound was so much easier to handle<n>than reality... So to drown out the<n>noise in my head, I mixed... and<n>mixed... and mixed...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (And I threw it out into the world. It's<n>not like I wanted people to hear it. I<n>just wanted to tell reality to blow off...<n>to prove to myself...)

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: This song's the best! Amp it up for<n>real, !monaaaad!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (Argh, no more philosophizing.<n>"Making memories" is kid stuff. I'll<n>pump it up, blast the volume, and turn<n>this moment into something<n>mind-melting!)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: (Good, everyone looks happy. This<n>music is rather intense, but we should<n>do DJ time again next—oh, it's those<n>two.)

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text: Good thing we made it—geez, are you<n>crying?!

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: Sorry... I just, this is s-so cool! Yeah, I<n>love this. !monad's music is like<n>screaming your feelings out!

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text: It's cool—leave it at that! We're<n>gonna wreck this place too. Next<n>time... we'll do dresses and<n>everything!

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: ...Right. Yeah! Hehe, then it's a date...<n>promise!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Interesting... Pursuing my own<n>happiness led to this scene.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: (I don't have time to gaze in awe<n>though. The participation rate was<n>less than ideal. I'll need to think of<n>new measures for next time.)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: (Practice makes perfect. Next timeeveryone will enjoy this moment. Iwon't let anyone miss out again.)
